Title: Tales from the Magic Garden
Director: Patrik Pass Jr., Jean-Claude Rozec, David Sukup
Writer: Kaja Balog, Arnost Goldflam, Blandine Jet
Actors: Mikulas Cizek, Arnost Goldflam, Zofie Hanova
Plot: Three kids spend the night at their grandpa's house. To fill the silence after losing their grandma, the family's storyteller, they create their own stories and discover the power of imagination.
